name: Burger Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a bread machine and activate the dough setting, or mix all ingredients in a bowl and knead for 5 minutes.
2. Let rise. Dough can be taken out of the bread machine after 45 minutes or left to the end of the cycle. If rising in a bowl, oil the bowl.
3. Divide dough into 8 equal parts (more or less...) and form each part into a smooth ball (again more or less...).
4. Place on a baking sheet and let rise for 20-40 minutes, until doubled.
5. Beat one egg and brush over buns.
6. Top with favorite toppings (sesame seeds, poppy seeds, garlic). Whatever).
7. Bake at 400°F. for 10-15 minutes.
